core_papers.title: From Perfect to Approximate Hints: Efficient LWE Secret Recovery Leveraging Low Hamming Weight

rationale.problem: 从摘要看，论文关注的问题是：The Learning With Errors (LWE) problem is a cornerstone of lattice-based cryptography and underpins the security of numerous cryptographic schemes.
rationale.method: While this approach improves performance, it raises security concerns, particularly against side-channel attacks that can leak partial information, or “hints,” about the secret key.
rationale.contribution: While this approach improves performance, it raises security concerns, particularly against side-channel attacks that can leak partial information, or “hints,” about the secret key.

core_papers.title: Advancing Pseudorandom Codes: Beyond Parity Checks and Standard-Model CCA1 Security

rationale.problem: 从摘要看，论文关注的问题是：Pseudorandom codes (PRCs) are error-correcting codes whose codewords are computationally indistinguishable from uniform random strings, a primitive motivated by the need to robustly watermark generative AI models.
rationale.method: On the structural side, we propose a novel PRC template that departs from the prior one based on sparse parity-check trapdoors.
rationale.contribution: On the structural side, we propose a novel PRC template that departs from the prior one based on sparse parity-check trapdoors.
rationale.radar_relevance: 与格密码/PQC 雷达相关：可见证据包含 lwe、mlwe、module sis、module-sis、ntru、rlwe、sis。

core_papers.title: Towards Post-Quantum Secure Pharmacovigilance with ML-KEM and ML-DSA

rationale.problem: 从摘要看，论文关注的问题是：Pharmacovigilance systems handle sensitive healthcare and drug-safety data, including adverse event reports and clinical observations.
rationale.method: This paper presents an educational prototype of a post-quantum secure pharmacovigilance data pipeline.
rationale.contribution: The system uses ML-KEM-768 for post-quantum key establishment, HKDF-SHA-256 for deriving an AES key, AES-256-GCM for efficient file encryption, and ML-DSA-65 for digital signatures and tamper detection.
rationale.radar_relevance: 与格密码/PQC 雷达相关：可见证据包含 dilithium、falcon、kyber、lattice、ml-dsa、ml-kem。

core_papers.title: BRaccoon: Concurrently Secure Blind Lattice Signatures from Raccoon

rationale.problem: 从摘要看，论文关注的问题是：Blind signatures are a central primitive for privacy-preserving applications such as e-cash, anonymous credentials, and e-voting.
rationale.method: In the post-quantum setting, existing constructions typically follow one of two paradigms: either signatures are realized as non-interactive zero-knowledge ($\mathsf{NIZK}$) proofs of valid underlying signatures, or they are obtained from…
rationale.contribution: In both approaches, the resulting signatures deviate syntactically from standard signatures, incurring additional verification overhead and limiting compatibility with existing infrastructures.

core_papers.title: Rank Ceiling for Twiddle-Perturbation Faults on the Forward NTT

rationale.problem: 从摘要看，论文关注的问题是：NIST standardised a lattice-based key-encapsulation mechanism (ML-KEM) and a lattice-based digital signature scheme (ML-DSA) in 2024 as post-quantum replacements for classical key establishment and digital signatures.
rationale.method: Both compute a forward number-theoretic transform (NTT) over secret-bearing polynomials; the NTT's twiddle constants are a documented fault-attack surface.
rationale.contribution: A single twiddle fault leaks exactly the butterfly length of its layer in secret coefficients, a count attained rather than merely bounded, so one fault per layer pins all but two coefficients for ML-KEM and all but one for ML-DSA.
rationale.radar_relevance: 与格密码/PQC 雷达相关：可见证据包含 dilithium、falcon、kyber、lattice、ml-dsa、ml-kem。

core_papers.title: On the Secrecy of the Encapsulation Coin in ML-KEM

rationale.problem: 从摘要看，论文关注的问题是：ML-KEM (FIPS 203) draws a fresh 32-byte coin at each encapsulation.
rationale.method: Outside the validated FIPS-140-3 configuration that most deployments do not yet use, the coin's secrecy rests on convention, not construction.
rationale.contribution: The predictability this permits is externally invisible and parameter-controlled, of the class shown once before in Dual_EC_DRBG.
